businessSummary.oneLiner: World's largest EV maker and 'Physical AI Platform' spanning autonomous driving, robotics, and energy
businessSummary.description: Tesla is transitioning from EV manufacturing to an integrated AI/robotics/energy platform. FY2025 revenue $94.8B (-2.9% YoY), net income $3.79B (-46.5% YoY). Friday close $391.20 (-0.96%). Continued market weakness weighed on shares. China Jan-Feb sales rebounded to 127,728 units (+35% YoY). FSD data submitted to NHTSA (3/9). GTC 2026 (3/16-19) may reignite autonomous driving narrative. Market cap $1.47T, P/E ~387x, Forward P/E ~189x.
howTheyMakeMoney: Vehicle sales: ~73% of revenue ($69.5B). Model 3/Y are the core, Model S/X discontinuing Q2 2026
Energy business: ~14% of revenue ($12.8B, +27% YoY). Megapack/Powerwall growth
Services/Other: ~10% of revenue. Supercharger network, insurance, parts
FSD/Software: License revenue ~$3B. Subscription conversion accelerating

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Extremely high valuation reflecting AI/robotics premium

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Reflects earnings improvement expectations, still elevated

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth (YoY)
keyMetrics.interpretation: FY2025 negative growth. Vehicle sales decline was the main driver

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Profitability significantly impacted by price cut strategy

keyMetrics.name: ROE
keyMetrics.interpretation: Capital efficiency sharply declined. Earnings recovery needed

keyMetrics.name: Gross Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Near historical lows due to intensifying price competition

growthDrivers.title: China Jan-Feb Sales +35% YoY Rebound — BYD Reversal Possible
growthDrivers.description: CNBC (3/13): China-made EV sales of 127,728 units, up 35% YoY. Tesla rebounding while BYD sales slow. Positive signal amid global delivery decline concerns.

growthDrivers.title: GTC 2026 (3/16-19) — Autonomous Driving Theme Revival D-2
growthDrivers.description: NVIDIA GTC set to unveil Rubin architecture. CPU-centric AI agent infrastructure could catalyze FSD/robotaxi ecosystem. Tesla autonomous tech revaluation possible.

growthDrivers.title: FSD Data NHTSA Submission Complete — Regulatory Milestone
growthDrivers.description: FSD driving data submitted to NHTSA on 3/9. Regulatory approval could accelerate robotaxi timeline.

growthDrivers.title: Macrohard (Digital Optimus) — xAI Joint Venture Software Push
growthDrivers.description: Musk unveiled Tesla-xAI joint project. Grok LLM-based AI agents automating office work. Potential new software revenue stream.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 50%+ US EV market share leader (globally overtaken by BYD). Vertical integration across software, manufacturing, energy, and FSD's 8.2B miles is the core moat.

moats.description: 8.2 billion FSD miles driven. Overwhelmingly superior training data vs. competitors.
In-house battery (4680), custom chips (HW4), software (FSD), charging infrastructure (Supercharger).
NACS is the North American EV charging standard. GM, Ford, Rivian depend on Tesla Superchargers.

competitors.name: BYD
competitors.detail: 2025 global EV sales 2.26M units (+28%). Overtook Tesla's 1.64M (-9%)

competitors.name: Lucid (LCID)
competitors.detail: Q4 revenue $523M (+123%). Targeting premium EV market

competitors.name: Rivian (RIVN)
competitors.detail: R2 launch targeting mass market entry

competitors.name: Waymo (Alphabet)
competitors.detail: Expanding autonomous taxi services. L4 self-driving leader

recentNews.headline: Tesla China Jan-Feb EV Sales 127,728 Units (+35% YoY) — Rebound as BYD Drops
recentNews.significance: China market rebound is a positive signal amid global delivery decline concerns. Price cuts + new model effects.

recentNews.headline: Reuters: Tesla Delivery Slide May Stretch to Third Year — Cash Burn Concerns
recentNews.significance: Some analysts projecting continued delivery decline in 2026. Musk's DOGE involvement raising focus concerns.

recentNews.headline: Strong China Sales and Digital Optimus Focus Boost Tesla Stock
recentNews.significance: Weekly +3% gain. China sales growth and margin improvement as positive catalysts.

recentNews.headline: FSD Data Submitted to NHTSA — March Regulatory Milestone
recentNews.significance: Regulatory approval status could determine robotaxi timeline. Market uncertainty resolution possible.

recentNews.headline: BofA Upgrades to Buy — $460 Target, AI/Robotics Pipeline Undervalued
recentNews.significance: Bank of America upgraded Hold→Buy, noting AI/robotics assets are undervalued amid DOGE noise.

analystOpinions.notableComment: BofA Buy upgrade with $460 target — AI/robotics pipeline undervalued amid DOGE noise. Bears highlight risk of third consecutive year of delivery declines.

risks.title: Potential Third Consecutive Year of Delivery Declines
risks.description: Reuters: Some analysts projecting 2026 delivery decline as well. Profitability erosion accelerates if pricing power weakens.

risks.title: CEO Musk's DOGE/Political Involvement Diluting Focus
risks.description: DOGE participation, xAI, SpaceX multitasking raising concerns about Tesla management attention.

risks.title: P/E 387x — Sharp Correction Risk If Expectations Miss
risks.description: Extreme valuation. AI/robotics/FSD underdelivery could trigger significant derating.

risks.title: BYD Global Competition Intensifying
risks.description: BYD overtook Tesla in global sales. Market share erosion continuing in China and Europe.

buyReasons.title: China Sales Rebound — Signal of Recovery from Negative Growth
buyReasons.rationale: Jan-Feb China sales +35% YoY. Recovery signs emerging from overall delivery decline trend.

buyReasons.title: Energy Business High Growth — Reducing Vehicle Dependency
buyReasons.rationale: Energy revenue $12.8B (+27% YoY), higher margins than vehicles. Revenue diversification progressing.

buyReasons.title: FSD/Robotaxi Regulatory Progress
buyReasons.rationale: FSD data submitted to NHTSA. Regulatory approval unlocks multi-trillion dollar TAM.

buyReasons.title: $44B Cash — Financial Safety Margin
buyReasons.rationale: Net cash $29.3B. Ample investment capacity even in economic downturn.

overallOpinion: Tesla shows a positive signal with China sales rebounding (+35%), but global delivery decline concerns and an extreme P/E of 387x remain burdensome. Trading below both 50-day and 200-day moving averages indicates technical weakness.
GTC 2026 (D-2) autonomous driving theme revival + FSD NHTSA regulatory progress provide short-term catalysts. The energy business (+27%) is key to revenue diversification.

At current prices, the stock can be interpreted as overvalued as an EV manufacturer but undervalued as an AI/robotics platform. The $390 range may be a reasonable entry for long-term investors, but risk management is needed until delivery recovery is confirmed.

threads.hook: Tesla China sales +35% rebound 📈 while BYD drops?
threads.text: Tesla China Jan-Feb sales hit 127,728 units (+35% YoY) while BYD slows. But Reuters warns of 'third straight year of delivery decline.' GTC D-2, FSD data submitted. $391 — crisis or opportunity? 🔗 investory.kro.kr/stock/TSLA/analysis/2026-03-14

telegram.hook: 🚗 Tesla: China Rebound vs Global Delivery Drop — Mixed Signals
telegram.text:
📊 TSLA $391.20 (-0.96%)

🇨🇳 China Jan-Feb EV sales 127,728 units (+35% YoY) surprise rebound. BYD actually declining. Price cuts + new model effects.

⚠️ But Reuters warns of potential third consecutive year of delivery decline. CEO Musk's DOGE involvement raising management focus concerns.

🎯 Analyst consensus: Hold, target $396 (near current price)

✨ Catalysts: GTC 2026 D-2 (autonomous theme), FSD NHTSA data submitted, energy business +27% growth

P/E 387x is concerning but $44B cash provides safety margin. Whether China rebound extends globally is the key question.

🔗 investory.kro.kr/stock/TSLA/analysis/2026-03-14
